## Scope

## Checklist

- [ ] Commit messages follow the convention (`type(scope): ...`)
- [ ] Code and comments are in English
- [ ] Added/updated tests for changed logic (ZipStore, loaders, gates, export)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] No `console.log` or secrets left in the diff
